art_direction: Bold creative agency aesthetic with high-contrast orange energy (#ff6b35), masonry-inspired asymmetric layouts, and premium card-based UI. Dense, high-fidelity components with 12px radius cards, soft shadows, and pill-shaped interactive elements. Clean white canvas with strategic dark (#111111) and muted (#888888) accents.

typography_overrides.display_font: Plus Jakarta Sans, 700 weight, tight letter-spacing (-0.02em)

organs.atom_style_hint: viewBox='0 0 220 520'. Dense search interface with orange (#ff6b35) active states, Plus Jakarta Sans headers at 18px, Inter body at 13px. Card radius 12px, shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08). Compact form inputs with 9999px pill-shaped search button. High pixel density: 1px strokes, 8px grid system.

viewBox='0 0 620 520'. Hero masonry grid for iframe previews. White cards with 12px radius, #111111 headers (Plus Jakarta Sans 24px), muted #888888 meta text (Inter 11px uppercase). 32px internal padding. High-fidelity browser chrome mockups at 1:1 scale. Orange (#ff6b35) accent badges.

viewBox='0 0 260 520'. Arbitrage panel with dark (#1a1a2e) header bar contrast. High-density text hierarchy: 20px Plus Jakarta Sans bold titles, 12px Inter secondary. Pill badges with orange background (#ff6b35) on white cards. Compact list items at 44px height. Shadow depth on hover states.

viewBox='0 0 1140 180'. Full-width trace log with monospace Inter (13px) for code, Plus Jakarta Sans (14px bold) for section labels. Dark (#111111) left border accent (4px). White background with subtle top shadow. High-density data tables with 8px row padding. Orange (#ff6b35) status indicators.

viewBox='0 0 240 520'. File explorer with tree navigation. Plus Jakarta Sans 12px uppercase folder labels (weight 600), Inter 13px file names. Orange (#ff6b35) active file indicator. 12px card radius, white background with subtle shadow. High-density: 32px row height, 8px icon + text spacing. Dark (#111111) icons.

viewBox='0 0 660 520'. Split editor zone with high-contrast syntax highlighting. Background #ffffff, text #333333, keywords #ff6b35 (orange). Plus Jakarta Sans for UI chrome (14px), monospace for code (13px Inter). 12px radius container. Dense UI: 24px toolbar height, 4px grid alignment. Roadmap view uses pill-shaped status badges (9999px radius).

viewBox='0 0 200 520'. Agent chat panel with compressed message bubbles. Plus Jakarta Sans 14px bold for agent name, Inter 12px for messages. Pill-shaped input field (9999px radius) with orange (#ff6b35) send button. High density: message spacing 8px, avatar 28px. Dark (#111111) bot avatar background.

viewBox='0 0 1140 200'. Terminal with dark (#111111) background theme (alternative to white for contrast). Monospace Inter 12px, line-height 1.5. Orange (#ff6b35) command prompts. Plus Jakarta Sans 11px uppercase labels for 'TERMINAL' and 'AUDIT'. High density: 20px line height, 8px padding. 12px top radius only.

viewBox='0 0 200 560'. Intent history timeline with vertical orange (#ff6b35) progress line (2px). Plus Jakarta Sans 13px bold for intent titles, Inter 11px muted (#888888) timestamps. White cards with 12px radius, connected by dotted line. High density: 64px timeline items, 8px connector dots.

viewBox='0 0 700 560'. Genome viewer hero canvas with explosive node visualization. Dark (#1a1a2e) background variant for dramatic contrast. Orange (#ff6b35) primary nodes with white (#ffffff) text (Plus Jakarta Sans 10px bold). High-fidelity SVG paths, 1-2px strokes. Inter 12px for metadata overlays. 12px radius container with heavy shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)).

viewBox='0 0 200 560'. Pedagogy panel with stacked zones. Plus Jakarta Sans 14px bold section headers, Inter 12px body. Q&A uses pill-shaped tags (9999px radius). HCI section uses 12px card radius with #f5f5f5 background. High density: 40px row height, 16px section spacing. Orange (#ff6b35) accent icons.

viewBox='0 0 1140 160'. Contextual explanation bar with code snippets. White background, top border 1px #eeeeee. Monospace Inter 12px for code blocks with 12px radius gray background (#f5f5f5). Plus Jakarta Sans 13px bold for 'Context' label. High density: 32px tab height, orange (#ff6b35) active tab indicator (2px).

viewBox='0 0 260 600'. Secrets configuration with form density. Plus Jakarta Sans 12px uppercase labels (weight 600), Inter 13px input text. Orange (#ff6b35) active input borders. 12px card radius, shadow on hover. Pill-shaped toggle switches (9999px). High density: 40px input height, 12px label spacing. Dark (#111111) section headers.

viewBox='0 0 600 600'. Dual deployment view with split interface. Left: chat (Inter 13px, Plus Jakarta Sans 14px bold agent names). Right: iframe preview with 12px radius browser chrome. High-fidelity at 1:1 scale. Orange (#ff6b35) send buttons and status badges. White background, 32px internal padding. Shadow separator between zones.

viewBox='0 0 240 600'. Vision capture panel with large orange (#ff6b35) pill button (9999px radius) as primary CTA. Plus Jakarta Sans 16px bold for button text. Inter 12px for analysis results. High density: 48px button height, 8px grid for image thumbnails. White cards with 12px radius for vision results. Dark (#111111) header.
